subcodes.first_line: O ye who are associated with that soul who hath ascended unto the Most Exalted Companion! The consummate wisdom of God hath ordained that a matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبین آن فائز به رفیق اعلی حکمت بالغه الهیه اقتضا چنین نموده بود که امری
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
